title: People · Technology · Process — three pillars, one engine.
description: The India GCC focuses on predictive inventory, membership analytics, omnichannel fulfilment, and cybersecurity — all in service of a member-first promise.

pillars.title: People
pillars.blurb: Member-obsessed engineers, designers, analysts, and ops leaders who do the right thing — every time.

pillars.title: Technology
pillars.blurb: Modern platforms that move at warehouse speed and member scale.

pillars.title: Process
pillars.blurb: Disciplined operations and continuous improvement, end to end.
